action.reasoning: Observation: train.py --test still fails with KeyError: 'task' in tokenizer_processor because our dataset returns flat keys like 'observation.images.base_0_rgb' instead of the nested observation dict expected by LeRobot's preprocessor pipeline. Analysis: The preprocessor pipeline (make_pre_post_processors) expects input batch dict with an 'observation' key containing sub-dicts for images and state, so that rename_observations_processor can convert them to the Pi0 flat format. Our custom collate bypassed this, causing complementary_data to be misplaced. Decision: rewrite train.py with correct nested observation format (observation/images/base_0_rgb etc.), compute stats properly and pass them via the 'normalizer_processor' override (using correct format), train for 5 epochs on 200 episodes, and verify preprocessing works before committing to full training. We will not submit eval yet; predict.py must be adapted to load the trained LoRA adapter first.
